_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate across internal and/or external organizational lines to enhance collection, analysis and dissemination.
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.518), OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.517).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.684). Shared vocabulary: [across]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, collaborate, collection, dissemination, enhance, external] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, alignment, analytical, business, communication, complex] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.867, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Collaborate across internal and/or external organizational lines to enhance coll" and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.544 < STS 0.684 (gap -0.140). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, collaborate, collection] and [access, alignment, analytical] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [across]. DCWF-only: [analysis, collaborate, collection, dissemination, enhance, external]. WIDAI-only: [access, alignment, analytical, business, communication, complex].
